comment: Catwalk-shaped gap-fill fixture (list-based, catwalk field names: api_base, context_window, max_output_tokens). Cases: (a) leaf field missing from models.dev — anthropic provider `api` and claude-fable-5 `knowledge`; (b) whole model missing — claude-omega; (c) whole provider missing — acme-ai; (d) genuine §7.3 conflict — claude-fable-5 `reasoning_options` proposed as a string where models.dev has an array (type-mismatch-vs-curated); (e) source-boundary schema violation — claude-haiku-4-5 scalar `cost` (validation error at source boundary, NOT a merge conflict, per §7.3); (f) unknown catwalk fields (catwalk_notes, default_max_tokens) that must be preserved; (g) overlapping same-type leaf (`name`) where models.dev-primary must win silently.
